mapper.select:
SELECT ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_TYPE_CD, RATE_TYPE_CD, RATE_TYPE_NM, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_MAIN_INCOME, is_lease, PRODUCT_CODE FROM m_fee_item
ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_fee_item(ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_TYPE_CD, RATE_TYPE_CD, RATE_TYPE_Nm, SORT_NUM, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IS_MAIN_INCOME,is_lease,PRODUCT_CODE) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{itemCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateTypeNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{isMainIncome,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isLease,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE m_fee_item SET ITEM_CD = #{itemCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_NM = #{itemNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ITEM_TYPE_CD = #{itemTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_TYPE_CD = #{rateTypeCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_TYPE_NM = #{rateTypeNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, IS_MAIN_INCOME = #{isMainIncome,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_lease = #{isLease,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ID = #{id}
